Document_Upload: Upload a file or drag & drop
TitleCard_Subtext: For the next 60 days, declare your devices for free. After this period, registration and fees will apply for all devices entering the country.
IMEICheck_Subtext2: Enter IMEI to the field below and click Check IMEI
IMEIVerify_Subtext: Check if your device's IMEI is valid and compliant before declaring it
DeviceInfo_Valid: This device is valid and already registered.
DeviceInfo_Unregistered: This device is valid but not registered. Please proceed with the declaration to be able to use it.
DeviceInfo_Unregistered_Public: This IMEI is valid but not yet registered. Sign up to declare it.
DeviceInfo_Unregistered_Importer: This IMEI is valid and can be declared from your importer workspace.
DeviceInfo_Unregistered_Individual: This IMEI is valid and can be declared from your individual workspace.
DeviceInfo_PaymentPending_Public: This IMEI has a pending declaration that still requires payment. Sign in to continue.
DeviceInfo_PaymentPending_Importer: This IMEI has a pending declaration that still requires payment. Review your declarations to continue if it belongs to your account.
DeviceInfo_PaymentPending_Individual: This IMEI has a pending declaration that still requires payment. Contact support to continue if it belongs to your account.
DeviceInfo_DeclarationInProgress_Public: This IMEI already has an active declaration in progress. Sign in to track it.
DeviceInfo_DeclarationInProgress_Importe: This IMEI already has an active declaration in progress. Review your declarations to track it if it belongs to your account.
DeviceInfo_DeclarationInProgress_Individ: This IMEI already has an active declaration in progress. Contact support to track it if it belongs to your account.
DeviceInfo_Invalid: This device is not valid and might be counterfeit. Make sure you entered the IMEI correctly.
DeviceInfo_IMEIs: IMEIs that belong to the device
DeviceInfo_IssuesMessage: No issues detected. The device is not blacklisted.
CompliantCard_Header: How to Stay Compliant with CEIR
CompliantCard_SubText1: Ensure your device is eligible for declaration by using the IMEI verification tool.
AboutCard_Summary: The Central Equipment Identity Register (CEIR) ensures that all devices entering the country are legitimate, secure, and compliant with regulations.
AboutCard_SubText1: All devices must be declared within the next 60 days to avoid fees.
AboutCard_SubText2: Ensure your devices meet regulatory standards.
AboutCard_SubText3: After the declaration period, registration and fees will be required.
DeclareCard_SubText1: Declare your devices at no cost for the next 60 days
DeclareCard_SubText2: Ensure your devices are legitimate and compliant
DeclareCard_SubText3: Importers can declare multiple devices through bulk uploads
FAQ_SubText1: A temporary period allowing free device declarations. After this, registration and fees will apply for new devices.
FAQ_SubHeader2: Who needs to declare their devices?
FAQ_SubHeader4: How do I declare multiple devices?
FAQ_SubHeader5: What should I do if my IMEI is invalid?
SupportCard_SubText: If you need assistance with the declaration process or have questions, contact us:
SupportCard_NoPhoneAlert: Your account has no registered phone number. Please contact your account administrator to add one before you can send a message.
LoginPage_SubHeader: Welcome back! Enter your credentials to access your services
LoginPage_SessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

OTP_SubText: Enter the OTP code sent to
TacInfo_Subtext: Review TAC reference records loaded into the platform pricing and validation catalog.
TacInfo_SearchPlaceholder: Search by TAC, brand, or model
TacInfo_ReviewSubtext: Review customs-proposed TAC estimated price changes before they are applied to live pricing.
TacInfo_RequestSubtext: Customs can propose TAC estimated price changes here. Live values only change after administrator approval.
TacInfo_ReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this estimated value should be updated.
TacInfo_ReasonRequired: Add a reason before submitting the request.
TacInfo_RequestSuccess: Estimated price update request submitted for admin approval.
TacInfo_RequestError: Failed to submit estimated price update request.
TacInfo_ReviewError: Failed to review the TAC price change request.
TacInfo_LoadError: Failed to load TAC records. Please try again.
TacInfo_ApproveSuccess: Estimated price request approved and applied.
TacInfo_InvalidEstimatedValue: Enter a valid positive estimated price up to 12 digits and 2 decimals.
TacInfo_NoPendingRequests: There are no TAC price updates waiting for review right now.
TacInfo_NoOpenRequests: You do not have any TAC price requests yet.
TacInfo_OpenRequestsCount_one: {{count}} TAC price request is waiting for admin review.
TacInfo_OpenRequestsCount_other: {{count}} TAC price requests are waiting for admin review.

IndividualDeclarations_UnderReviewText: Your declaration is currently under customs review. You will be able to continue once customs approves it.
IndividualDeclarations_AwaitingPaymentTe: Your declaration has been approved by customs. Proceed to payment to complete registration.
IndividualDeclarations_RejectedText: This declaration was rejected by customs. Please review the reason below before submitting a new declaration.

Status_ROLE_IMPORTEREnabledSubText: Your account was approved by our team, you can begin declaring your devices.
Status_ROLE_IMPORTERPendingSubText: Your importer account is under review. You'll be notified once approved.
Status_ROLE_IMPORTERRejectedSubText: Your account has been rejected, please contact support to resolve any conflicts.

Customs_DashboardEmpty: No dashboard data is available yet.
Customs_DashboardPriorityQueueDescriptio: Review the declarations that need customs action first, across importers and individuals.
Customs_DashboardTodayWorkloadDescriptio: Prioritize declarations by action needed, payment exposure, SLA age, and valuation risk.
Customs_DashboardOldestPendingHint: Longest open item needing customs action
Customs_DashboardFinancialExposureDescri: Invoice totals that customs should monitor through payment and closure.
Customs_DashboardNoPriority: No declarations currently need action in this queue.
Customs_DashboardDeclarationMixDescripti: See the current workload split between importer and individual declarations.
Customs_DashboardOverdueDescription: Declarations that have been waiting longer than the expected customs handling window.
Customs_DashboardHighVarianceDescription: Declarations with the biggest gap between declared and estimated values.
Customs_DashboardNoVariance: No high-variance declarations to review right now.
Customs_DashboardStatusDistributionDescr: Track how the full customs workload is spread across each declaration state.
Customs_DashboardWorkflowTrendDescriptio: Declarations created over the last 7 days, grouped by their current dashboard status.

Adjusted value must be a whole number.
Configuration_Subtext: Manage system-wide invoice pricing used by customs and importer workflows.
Configuration_InvoiceRatesDescription: Set the customs duty and VAT percentages used for importer invoices. Saving new values refreshes all existing invoices automatically.
Configuration_PriceAdjustmentDescription: Allow customs officers to adjust declaration prices and propose a new value before approval. When disabled, the Adjust action is hidden and blocked.
Configuration_DeleteDeclarationsDescript: Allow administrators to delete all importer and individual declarations for testing. This action stays unavailable until the toggle is saved.
Configuration_DeleteActionEnabledDescrip: Declaration deletion is enabled. You can now remove all importer and individual declarations for a fresh test cycle.
Configuration_DeleteActionDisabledDescri: Turn on Can Delete above before deleting declarations.
Configuration_DeleteConfirm: Delete all importer and individual declarations? This action cannot be undone.
Configuration_DeleteConfirmSubtext: This will permanently remove all importer and individual declarations so you can start fresh with new uploads and IMEI tests.
Are you sure you want to delete all decl: Are you sure you want to delete all declarations?
Configuration_DeleteError: Failed to delete declarations. Please try again.
Configuration_AutoRefreshNote: Any change here updates the stored invoice totals, percentages, and downloadable PDFs automatically.
Configuration_LoadError: Failed to load configuration. Please try again.
Configuration_SaveError: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
